title: Repository Management Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub repository maintenance.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what does 'Archiving' a repository do?
options: It makes the repository's code and issues read-only while preserving history
It moves the repository to an external server

questions.question: What is a major potential consequence of deleting a GitHub repository?
options: It permanently removes the code, version history, and issues from GitHub's servers
It makes the code faster to build
It deletes only the master branch
It hides the code from search

questions.question: When you rename a GitHub repository, what happens to existing project links?
options: They are automatically redirected to the new repository name
They point only to the oldest commit
They must be updated manually in every browser
